rationale: This page provides detailed information on India's GSAT-7 satellite series, the MK-II (A) Laser Directed Energy Weapon (DEW) system, and the Stratospheric Airship Platform (SAP). It includes technical specifications, development agencies, and international context, making it highly suitable for generating multiple-choice questions on defense technology.
cleanedText:
Other Satellites in the GSAT-7 Series
* For Navy: GSAT-7 (Rukmini): It is India’s first officially dedicated military satellite.
* For Air Force:
* GSAT-7A (Angry Bird): It helps the IAF connect various platforms like aircraft, helicopters, UAVs, Airborne early warning and control (AWACS) aircraft, missile units and radars.
* GSAT-7C: To be developed and includes ground hubs for real-time, secure communication.
* For Army: GSAT-7B: To be developed to enhance surveillance and communication in border areas.
6.5. MK-II (A) LASER- DIRECTED ENERGY WEAPON (DEW) SYSTEM
Why in the News?
DRDO successfully conducted a trial of an Mk-II (A) LASER- Directed Energy Weapon (DEW) system at the National Open-Air Range (NOAR) in Andhra Pradesh.
More on the News
* India joined group of countries such as US, China, and Russia who possess advanced LASER weapon capabilities.
* Also, recently, Israel becomes First Country to shoot down enemy Drones with Laser Weapon.
* Israel Air Force's Aerial Defense Array used the prototype laser air defences.
* It is described as an adapted version of the Iron Beam system, a High Energy Laser Weapon System (HELWS).
About Mk-II (A) DEW system
* Developed indigenously by DRDO’s Centre for High Energy Systems and Sciences (CHESS), Hyderabad.
* Mechanism: Once detected by a radar or inbuilt Electro Optic (EO) system, it engages targets and uses an intense high-energy 30 kilowatt LASER Beam.
* Characteristics: Lightning speed of engagement, precision, and can have lethality delivered to the target within a few seconds.
About Directed Energy Weapons
* They use concentrated energy from electromagnetic or particle technology, rather than kinetic energy, to degrade or destroy targets.
* Types: High Energy LASER (HELs), High power microwave weapons (HPMs), millimeter waves, Particle beams weapons.
* DEWs generally have a shorter range than conventional weapons, and weather conditions—such as fog and storms—can make certain DEW less effective.
Other DEW Systems
* USA: High Energy Laser with Integrated Optical-dazzler and Surveillance (HELIOS) system
* China: Hurricane-3000 and Silent Hunter
* UK: DragonFire, Radio Frequency Directed Energy Weapon (RFDEW)
* Russia: Peresvet laser
* India: Integrated Drone Detection and Interdiction System (IDD&IS) Mk2A by DRDO
6.6. STRATOSPHERIC AIRSHIP PLATFORM (SAP)
Why in the News?
DRDO conducted maiden flight-trials of Stratospheric Airship Platform (SAP).
More on the News
* It has been developed by Aerial Delivery Research and Development Establishment, Agra.
